hero.description: iFriend helps you protect your child online, manage screen time, and block harmful content - all from one simple dashboard.

features.description: Everything you need to keep your child safe - without stress or complexity.

ai-ifriend.title: AI Companion
ai-ifriend.description: A safe AI companion your child can talk to - fully guided and controlled by you.

ai-reports.title: AI Insights
ai-reports.description: Get clear daily insights into your child’s activity, behavior, and digital habits.

bluer.title: Content Protection
bluer.description: Blocks harmful and 18+ content to keep your child safe online.

pediatric-emergency.title: Instant Alerts
pediatric-emergency.description: Get notified immediately if your child leaves a safe area or may be in danger.

product.heading: Total control. Zero stress.
product.description: Simple to use. Powerful enough to protect what matters most.

safe-content.title: Safe Content & Apps
safe-content.description: Control what your child can access and block harmful content instantly.

screen-time.title: Healthy Screen Time
screen-time.description: Set daily limits and build healthier digital habits.

calls.title: Call Control
calls.description: Manage who your child can contact and stay connected when it matters.

family-location.title: Live Location Tracking
family-location.description: Always know where your child is and feel reassured wherever they go.

supportAndSafety.description: iFriend helps you protect, guide, and support your child without making them feel watched.

smart-emotional.title: Emotional Support
smart-emotional.description: Detects signs of stress, bullying, or harmful behavior - and helps your child handle them safely.

healthy-routine.title: Healthy Habits
healthy-routine.description: Encourages balanced daily routines and responsible screen usage.

privacy-safety.title: Privacy Protection
privacy-safety.description: Keeps your child’s data safe and teaches them how to protect themselves online.

focus-learning.title: Focus Mode
focus-learning.description: Reduces distractions and helps your child stay focused during study time.

balanced-gaming.title: Smart Gaming Limits
balanced-gaming.description: Keeps gaming fun and balanced without extreme restrictions.

online-offline.title: Screen-Life Balance
online-offline.description: Helps your child build a healthy balance between online and real life.

howItWorks.description: Set up iFriend quickly and take control of your child’s digital safety right away.

download.title: Download the App
download.description: Install iFriend and create your account in minutes.

account-type.title: Set Up Your Profile
account-type.description: Create a parent account and add your child.

link.title: Connect Devices
link.description: Securely link your child’s device in seconds.

monitor.title: Stay in Control
monitor.description: Monitor activity, block risks, and guide your child safely.

reviews.heading: Parents are already seeing the difference
reviews.subheading: Real experiences. Real peace of mind.

playProtect.heading: Disable Play Protect
playProtect.description: If you're having trouble installing the app due to Google's Play Protect, follow these simple steps to temporarily disable the protection.
playProtect.phoneImageAlt: Play Protect settings screen on a smartphone
playProtect.importantNote: Important: Remember to re-enable Play Protect after installing the app for security reasons.

open-google-play.title: Open Google Play Store
open-google-play.description: Open the Google Play Store on your child's device by tapping the app icon on the home screen.

access-settings.title: Access Settings
access-settings.description: Tap the menu icon (≡) at the bottom or top corner, then select 'Settings' from the menu.

navigate-to-protect.title: Navigate to Play Protect Settings
navigate-to-protect.description: Look for 'Play Protect' option in the Settings menu and tap it to enter the protection settings page.

disable-protection.title: Disable the Protection
disable-protection.description: You'll find a toggle switch next to 'Scan apps with Play Protect'. Tap the toggle to temporarily disable the protection.

easy-to-use.question: Is it easy to use?
easy-to-use.answer: Yes. You can set everything up in minutes - no technical skills needed.

screen-time.question: Can I control screen time?
screen-time.answer: Yes. Set daily limits, schedules, and app restrictions.

data-safety.question: Is my child’s data safe?
data-safety.answer: Yes. All data is encrypted and fully protected.

all-devices.question: Does it work on all devices?
all-devices.answer: Works on Android and iOS devices.

download.heading: Start protecting your child today
download.description: Download iFriend and take control of your child’s digital safety in minutes.

meta.title: iFriend – Protect Your Child Online
meta.description: iFriend helps you protect your child, manage screen time, and block harmful content - all in one simple app.
